natural_language_question: What was the total Global Equity (sum of customer equity across TP + IBAN + Options + custodied assets) for valid customers as of 2026-06-08?
sql_used:
SELECT SUM(d.EquityGlobal) AS EquityGlobal
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_fact_aum d
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked snap
    ON snap.RealCID = d.RealCID
   AND snap.IsCreditReportValidCB = 1
   AND d.DateID BETWEEN snap.FromDateID AND snap.ToDateID
WHERE d.DateID = 20260608

natural_language_question: What was the total Global Realized Equity (excluding mark-to-market unrealized PnL on open positions) for valid customers as of 2026-06-08?
sql_used:
SELECT SUM(d.RealizedEquityGlobal) AS RealizedEquityGlobal
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_fact_aum d
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked snap
    ON snap.RealCID = d.RealCID
   AND snap.IsCreditReportValidCB = 1
   AND d.DateID BETWEEN snap.FromDateID AND snap.ToDateID
WHERE d.DateID = 20260608

natural_language_question: What was the total amount in USD of external (non-internal-transfer) deposits to the Trading Platform for valid customers yesterday (2026-06-08)? External deposits are payments made from outside the eToro ecosystem (e.g. card or wire from a customer's bank).
sql_used:
-- UC stores MIMOPlatform = 'TradingPlatform' (NOT 'TP').
SELECT SUM(d.AmountUSD) AS ExternalDepositsTPAmount
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_fact_mimo_allplatforms d
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked snap
    ON snap.RealCID = d.RealCID
   AND snap.IsCreditReportValidCB = 1
   AND d.DateID BETWEEN snap.FromDateID AND snap.ToDateID
WHERE d.DateID = 20260608
  AND d.MIMOAction = 'Deposit'
  AND d.MIMOPlatform = 'TradingPlatform'
  AND d.IsInternalTransfer = 0
  AND d.IsRedeem = 0

natural_language_question: How many distinct valid customers had a successful global cashout (any platform: TP, IBAN, Options, MoneyFarm) yesterday (2026-06-08)? GlobalCashedOut is a 0/1 per-customer flag on the daily-status table.
sql_used:
-- customer_daily_status already carries IsCreditReportValidCB so no SCD-2 join needed.
SELECT SUM(d.GlobalCashedOut) AS GlobalCashedOut_users
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_customer_daily_status d
WHERE d.DateID = 20260608
  AND d.IsCreditReportValidCB = 1

natural_language_question: What were the total external (non-internal-transfer) global deposits in USD for valid customers yesterday (2026-06-08)? Global means across all eToro platforms (TP, eMoney IBAN, Options, MoneyFarm).
sql_used:
-- Synapse GlobalDepositsAmount excludes internal transfers (eMoney->TP, etc).
-- IsRedeem=0 also excludes crypto-redeem-as-deposit reclass.
SELECT SUM(d.AmountUSD) AS GlobalDepositsAmount
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_fact_mimo_allplatforms d
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked snap
    ON snap.RealCID = d.RealCID
   AND snap.IsCreditReportValidCB = 1
   AND d.DateID BETWEEN snap.FromDateID AND snap.ToDateID
WHERE d.DateID = 20260608
  AND d.MIMOAction = 'Deposit'
  AND d.IsInternalTransfer = 0
  AND d.IsRedeem = 0

natural_language_question: How many global deposit transactions did valid customers make yesterday (2026-06-08)? Excludes internal transfers and crypto-redeem reclassifications.
sql_used:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS GlobalDepositsCount
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_fact_mimo_allplatforms d
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked snap
    ON snap.RealCID = d.RealCID
   AND snap.IsCreditReportValidCB = 1
   AND d.DateID BETWEEN snap.FromDateID AND snap.ToDateID
WHERE d.DateID = 20260608
  AND d.MIMOAction = 'Deposit'
  AND d.IsInternalTransfer = 0
  AND d.IsRedeem = 0

natural_language_question: How many valid customers made their first-ever Trading-Platform deposit yesterday (2026-06-08)? This is the TP-platform-specific FTD count (not Global FTD).
sql_used:
SELECT SUM(d.TPFirstDeposited) AS TPFirstDeposited
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_customer_daily_status d
WHERE d.DateID = 20260608
  AND d.IsCreditReportValidCB = 1

natural_language_question: What was the total Daily PnL (realized NetProfit + unrealized mark-to-market change) across all valid customers' positions on 2026-06-08?
sql_used:
-- fact_pnl is long-form: (DateID, RealCID, InstrumentTypeID, IsSettled, IsCopy).
-- DailyTotalPnL on the canvas = NetProfit + UnrealizedPnLChange across all rows.
SELECT SUM(d.NetProfit + d.UnrealizedPnLChange) AS DailyTotalPnL
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_fact_pnl d
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked snap
    ON snap.RealCID = d.RealCID
   AND snap.IsCreditReportValidCB = 1
   AND d.DateID BETWEEN snap.FromDateID AND snap.ToDateID
WHERE d.DateID = 20260608

natural_language_question: What was the total mark-to-market unrealized PnL across all valid customers' open positions as of 2026-06-08? Negative means open positions are aggregately under water.
sql_used:
-- TotalPositionPNL is on fact_aum (snapshot of MtM at end-of-day).
SELECT SUM(d.TotalPositionPNL) AS TotalPositionPNL
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_fact_aum d
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked snap
    ON snap.RealCID = d.RealCID
   AND snap.IsCreditReportValidCB = 1
   AND d.DateID BETWEEN snap.FromDateID AND snap.ToDateID
WHERE d.DateID = 20260608

natural_language_question: What was the total Admin Fee (dormancy/inactivity fee) revenue for valid customers yesterday (2026-06-08)?
sql_used:
SELECT SUM(d.Amount) AS AdminFee
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_fact_revenue_generating_actions d
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked snap
    ON snap.RealCID = d.RealCID
   AND snap.IsCreditReportValidCB = 1
   AND d.DateID BETWEEN snap.FromDateID AND snap.ToDateID
WHERE d.DateID = 20260608
  AND d.Metric = 'AdminFee'
  AND d.IncludedInTotalRevenue = 1

natural_language_question: What was the total Full Commission revenue for valid customers yesterday (2026-06-08)? Full Commission combines retail trading commission with both fixed and percentage-based ticket fees.
sql_used:
-- Per dwh-domain/cross-cutting/valid-users-filter-contract Pattern 2.
-- FullCommission = Commission + TicketFee + TicketFeeByPercent in Synapse SP.
SELECT SUM(d.Amount) AS FullCommission
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_fact_revenue_generating_actions d
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked snap
    ON snap.RealCID = d.RealCID
   AND snap.IsCreditReportValidCB = 1
   AND d.DateID BETWEEN snap.FromDateID AND snap.ToDateID
WHERE d.DateID = 20260608
  AND d.Metric IN ('FullCommission')
  AND d.IncludedInTotalRevenue = 1

natural_language_question: What was the total Spot Price Adjustment fee revenue for valid customers yesterday (2026-06-08)? Spot price adjustments reflect the spread mark-up applied to bid/ask quotes.
sql_used:
-- Synapse TVF column name is 'SpotPriceAdjustment'; on the canvas this tile
-- is labelled 'Spot Adjustment' but the underlying metric is SpotPriceAdjustment.
SELECT SUM(d.Amount) AS SpotPriceAdjustment
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_fact_revenue_generating_actions d
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked snap
    ON snap.RealCID = d.RealCID
   AND snap.IsCreditReportValidCB = 1
   AND d.DateID BETWEEN snap.FromDateID AND snap.ToDateID
WHERE d.DateID = 20260608
  AND d.Metric = 'SpotPriceAdjustment'
  AND d.IncludedInTotalRevenue = 1

natural_language_question:
What was eToro's Total Revenue (per the DDR) for valid customers
yesterday — i.e. on 2026-06-08?
sql_used:
-- Per dwh-domain/cross-cutting/valid-users-filter-contract.md Pattern 2
-- (regulatory variant — sheet pill is IsCreditReportValidCB).
SELECT SUM(d.Amount) AS TotalRevenue
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_fact_revenue_generating_actions d
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked snap
    ON snap.RealCID = d.RealCID
   AND snap.IsCreditReportValidCB = 1
   AND d.DateID BETWEEN snap.FromDateID AND snap.ToDateID
WHERE d.DateID = 20260608
  AND d.IncludedInTotalRevenue = 1
